function.name: _script_save_git_config
function.description: Save script Git repository configuration. After configuration, scripts can be pulled from or pushed to the Git repository.

repo.description: Git repository URL. Use https format for password auth (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo.git), use ssh format for SSH key auth (e.g. git@github.com:user/repo.git).

branch.description: Git branch name, default is master.

authType.description: Authentication type. Options: password (username/password), ssh (SSH key). Default is password.

user.description: Git username (required when authType is password).

password.description: Git password or access token (required when authType is password).

sshKey.description: SSH private key content (required when authType is ssh).

targetPath.description: Target path in the repository for syncing. Empty means repository root.
